StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT c_custkey, c_name, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue, c_acctbal, n_name, c_address, c_phone, c_comment FROM tpch_sf1.lineitem INNER JOIN tpch_sf1.orders ON l_orderkey = o_orderkey INNER JOIN tpch_sf1.customer ON o_custkey = c_custkey INNER JOIN tpch_sf1.nation ON c_nationkey = n_nationkey WHERE o_orderdate >= '1994-06-01' AND o_orderdate < '1994-09-01' AND l_returnflag = 'R' GROUP BY c_custkey, c_name, c_acctbal, c_phone, n_name, c_address, c_comment ORDER BY revenue DESC
